name: -O
--output-document
options.description: Write documents to FILE

name: -P
--directory-prefix
options.description: Save files to PREFIX/...

name: -c
--continue
options.description: Resume getting a partially-downloaded file

name: -r
--recursive
options.description: Turn on recursive retrieving

name: -l
--level
options.description: Maximum recursion depth (0 for infinite)

name: --mirror
options.description: Shortcut for -N -r -l inf --no-remove-listing

name: -np
--no-parent
options.description: Do not ascend to the parent directory when recursing

name: -nd
--no-directories
options.description: Do not create a hierarchy of directories

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Turn off output

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Turn on verbose output (default)

name: -nv
--no-verbose
options.description: Turn off verbose without being fully quiet

name: -U
--user-agent
options.description: Identify as AGENT instead of Wget/VERSION

name: --header
options.description: Insert STRING among the headers

name: --post-data
options.description: Use POST method and send STRING as the data

name: --post-file
options.description: Use POST method and send contents of FILE

name: --limit-rate
options.description: Limit download rate to RATE (e.g. 200k, 2m)

name: -t
--tries
options.description: Set number of retries to NUMBER (0 for infinite)

name: -T
--timeout
options.description: Set all timeout values to SECONDS

name: --connect-timeout
options.description: Set the connect timeout to SECONDS

name: --read-timeout
options.description: Set the read timeout to SECONDS

name: --dns-timeout
options.description: Set the DNS lookup timeout to SECONDS

name: --no-check-certificate
options.description: Do not validate the server's certificate

name: -k
--convert-links
options.description: Convert links in downloaded files for local viewing

name: -p
--page-requisites
options.description: Download all files necessary to properly display a page

name: -E
--adjust-extension
options.description: Save HTML/CSS documents with proper extensions

name: -H
--span-hosts
options.description: Go to foreign hosts when recursive

name: -D
--domains
options.description: Comma-separated list of accepted domains

name: -A
--accept
options.description: Comma-separated list of accepted extensions or patterns

name: -R
--reject
options.description: Comma-separated list of rejected extensions or patterns

name: -i
--input-file
options.description: Download URLs found in local or external FILE

name: --content-disposition
options.description: Honor the Content-Disposition header for file naming

name: -N
--timestamping
options.description: Only download files newer than local copies

name: -nc
--no-clobber
options.description: Skip downloads that would overwrite existing files

name: -b
--background
options.description: Go to background immediately after startup

name: -e
--execute
options.description: Execute COMMAND as a .wgetrc command

name: --user
options.description: Set both ftp and http user

name: --password
options.description: Set both ftp and http password

name: --http-user
options.description: Set http user

name: --http-password
options.description: Set http password

name: --referer
options.description: Include Referer: URL header in HTTP request

name: --no-cookies
options.description: Disable the use of cookies

name: --load-cookies
options.description: Load cookies from FILE before session

name: --save-cookies
options.description: Save cookies to FILE after session

name: -S
--server-response
options.description: Print server response headers

name: --spider
options.description: Do not download, just check if remote file exists

name: -w
--wait
options.description: Wait SECONDS between retrievals

name: --random-wait
options.description: Wait randomly between 0.5*WAIT and 1.5*WAIT seconds

name: --waitretry
options.description: Wait up to SECONDS between retries of a retrieval

name: -x
--force-directories
options.description: Force creation of directories

name: --no-host-directories
options.description: Do not create host directories

name: --cut-dirs
options.description: Ignore NUMBER remote directory components

name: --proxy
options.description: Explicitly turn proxies on or off

name: --no-proxy
options.description: Do not use proxies

name: --inet4-only
options.description: Connect only to IPv4 addresses

name: --inet6-only
options.description: Connect only to IPv6 addresses

name: --ca-certificate
options.description: File with the bundle of CAs

name: --certificate
options.description: Client certificate file

name: --private-key
options.description: Private key file

name: --secure-protocol
options.description: Choose secure protocol (auto, SSLv2, SSLv3, TLSv1, TLSv1_1, TLSv1_2, PFS)

name: -o
--output-file
options.description: Log all messages to FILE

name: -a
--append-output
options.description: Append messages to FILE

name: -d
--debug
options.description: Print lots of debugging information

name: --max-redirect
options.description: Maximum number of redirections allowed per page

name: -Q
--quota
options.description: Set retrieval quota to NUMBER

name: --no-dns-cache
options.description: Disable caching DNS lookups

name: --restrict-file-names
options.description: Restrict chars in file names to ones OS allows

name: --ignore-length
options.description: Ignore Content-Length header field

name: --no-http-keep-alive
options.description: Disable HTTP keep-alive (persistent connections)

name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not allow server-cached data
